title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at FedEx India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at FedEx India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Aurangabad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Aurangabad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!
